title: 2016-2022 Lexus RX450h Hybrid 12 Volt Vehicle Battery DIY Replacement Instructions
description: Replace the vehicle battery on 2016-2022 Lexus RX450H models, located inside the rear hatch area behind a trim panel.
tips: Disconnect the negative terminal before the positive terminal when removing, and install positive first when reinstalling.
Disconnect the small connector near the negative terminal to gain more working space.
Don't forget to disconnect the vent hose on the side of the battery before removal — it vents fumes out of the vehicle interior.
After battery replacement, the power hatch won't close automatically — manually close it with your hands to initialize it.
After initialization, verify the hatch opens and closes normally before finishing.
A park assist malfunction light may appear after battery replacement — drive in a straight line at over 40 mph for 5-10 seconds to clear it.
Apply battery terminal protective spray to prevent corrosion on the terminals.
When reinstalling push pins, press them out first so they're in the correct position before inserting — installing them in the wrong position means they won't hold.
Press push pins until flush only — going too far will cause them to loosen again.
Start the vehicle after completion and check for warning lights on the dash.

torque_specs.fastener: Battery hold-down bracket bolt and nut
